loginCreatedMessage: We have now created a login for you and your company. If you do not have the system details, you can always return later.
modelNameHint: The model is on the name plate on the back of the Power Unit
xrgiIdHint: The XRGI® ID is a 10 digit number located on the side of the IQ-Control Panel

tariffHint: Tariffs, taxes, etc., excl. flexible price
modalTitle: Do you want to save the changes?
modalMessage: Changes have been made to this XRGI®?
installationDescription: To start saving money on electricity, new software needs to be installed on your system. This software is developed by EC Power and ensures optimal performance while providing explanations on its benefits. The pricing for this service may vary depending on the plan. See the price overview here.
setupSuperSaverX: Do you want to set up SuperSaverX?
termsAgreement: I agree to the terms and conditions
performanceReport: We will compare the actual running hours of your XRGI® system to the expected running hours
performanceReport2: Please find the values in your initial quote* and fill in below
alreadyHaveContract: Do you have a service contract for your XRGI® system ?
alreadyHaveContract2: The information is required to grant your service partner access to our EC POWER Service Database
wantContract: Are you interested in a service contract with EC POWER?
emailHint: (You can enter multiple addresses separated by commas)

Installation.description: Our software users real time electricity market prices (EPEX Day-ahead) to automatically pause energy production, when the market prices are zero or negative
Installation.description2: (This software feature is standard on all XRGI® systems from April 2025)
Installation.atService: The software needs to be physically installed on your XRGI® system by your service partner

modal.modalDescription: The XRGI® ID is a 10 digit number which can be found on the side of the iQ-Control Panel
modal.modalContactSupportText: You can contact support if you have trouble locating it

energyCheckSubtitle: Get a monthly overview of how much you have saved with your XRGI System
